## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [35 articles ready for Rapyd's review; team discussing ways to streamline review process](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [New peak in overall sessions; non-branded impressions at all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Rapyd to provide competitor info and vertical-specific details for comparison posts](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Team to add Rapyd-suggested topics to Airtable for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [35 articles ready for Rapyd's review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Mark struggling to find time to assign and review blogs](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Kristin's team to help with reviews but needs guidance on Rapyd's specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Nicolette to provide training session on review process and Airtable usage](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [New peak level of overall sessions](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Engaged sessions slightly down from all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions at all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Google remains top referrer, followed by Bing and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Compliance cluster gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [LLM referrals back up after previous dip](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### Rapyd's Internal Metrics

  - [GrowthX blog contacts showing steady climb (13 submissions in August)](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Goal: Reach 30+ submissions per month](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Overall blog contacts recovering but not yet at previous peak](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### New Content Topics

  - [Rapyd team to suggest new topics (e.g., new payment methods, dynamic currency conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Team to create Airtable column for Rapyd-suggested topics](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Focus on vertical-specific comparison posts (e.g., best payment gateway for gaming platforms)](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Need for updated competitor information from Rapyd](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Focus on Rapyd's strengths: wallet infrastructure, virtual accounts, multicurrency business accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Kristin to provide access to existing competitor decks and Confluence pages](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to map clusters to existing Rapyd content groups](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Scope out potential Reddit posting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Add tags in Airtable for social media and Reddit repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Vivek to adjust Airtable permissions for Rapyd team members](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Mark to compile competitor information for comparison posts](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Nicolette to conduct Airtable training session for Kristin's team](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Follow up on Slack regarding team email for Airtable access](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Continue focus on vertical-specific comparison posts](https://fathom.video/share/xX2b5vFs79hTsGkxh4a-p7zwMyyFm44C?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
